title: Charlotte Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Charlotte with a Z-Score of +4.26. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Charlotte has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is unusually high, resulting in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 13.9 GG, while the Heating Degree Day (HDD) value is 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 43% and the wind speed is 10.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
